title: Green and Brown Dye Recipes
description: Adds crafting recipes for both green and brown dyes
body:
**This is a datapack that adds 2 new crafting recipes for 2 dyes (brown and green), that were previously not obtainable via combining dyes:**
- Yellow dye + Blue dye = Green dye
- ![GREEN RECIPE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a69a27a1425cd3b2a67fb347cc3b30dfacfe1587.png)
- Orange dye + black dye = brown dye
- ![Brown recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8da08efed2a8bca2f53aa3fd3a19ed4000ff0f91.png)
